_publications._publicationTitle: Modelling neurofibromatosis type 1 tibial dysplasia and its treatment with lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: These results are in agreement with ours, as heterozygous Nf1flox Prx1Cre mice did not differ in the progression of injury repair from wild-type mice (data not shown)
details: Heterozygous Nf1flox Prx1Cre mice did not differ in progression of injury repair from wild-type mice
